Metadata.title: Angpao — Digital Red Envelopes on Stellar
Metadata.description: Send love, send USDC. Digital red envelopes for Tet, Lebaran, and Chinese New Year.

Hero.title:
Send love,
send USDC.
Hero.subtitle: Wrap USDC in a digital red envelope — lì xì for Tet, angpao for Imlek. Secured by Soroban hashlock on Stellar.

HowItWorks.title: Send USDC in a digital red envelope — opened with a secret.
HowItWorks.subtitle: Angpao wraps a USDC gift, locks it behind a secret, and lets your recipient open it with one tap. Here is the full flow, end to end.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Choose an amount and how many slots. Angpao locks the USDC behind a SHA-256 hashlock with an expiry.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Share the envelope id and the secret with your recipient — over WhatsApp, Zalo, or in person.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: The recipient reveals the secret and the USDC is released straight to their Stellar wallet.
HowItWorks.underHoodSubtitle: The funds never sit with us. A Soroban smart contract on Stellar holds the USDC and releases it only when the rules are met.
HowItWorks.feat1Desc: A slot can only be opened by revealing the secret whose SHA-256 matches the digest locked on-chain.
HowItWorks.feat2Desc: Every envelope has an expiry. If it is not opened in time, the sender reclaims the remaining USDC — funds are never stuck.
HowItWorks.feat3Desc: One envelope can hold many slots, split equally or at random, so a whole group can each open their share.
HowItWorks.feat4Desc: The contract custodies the USDC and pays recipients directly. No intermediary can move the money.

Onchain.title: On-chain envelopes
Onchain.subtitle: Create, open, and inspect USDC red envelopes held by the Soroban escrow contract.
Onchain.createHint: Lock funds behind a secret. You get an id and a secret to share.
Onchain.trustlineNeeded: Your wallet needs a USDC trustline to escrow USDC.
Onchain.usdcNote: Creating an envelope moves {asset} from your wallet into the contract, so your Freighter wallet needs a testnet {asset} balance. Open and look-up work without funding.
Onchain.claimHint: Enter the envelope id and the secret you received.
Onchain.lookupHint: Read any envelope's on-chain state by id.

Connect.title: Connect a wallet
Connect.subtitle: Pick a Stellar wallet to sign in. Your wallet is your account.
Connect.installFreighter: Freighter extension is required to continue.
